title: Romance & Social Comedy Classics
description: Witty love stories, social pressure, and sharp character comedy—perfect for readers who want romance with brains.

title: Literary Fiction & Drama Classics
description: Character-driven classics with big themes—identity, morality, society, ambition, and what people hide from each other.

title: Adventure & Thriller Classics
description: Revenge, treasure hunts, escapes, danger, and big plot momentum—classic page-turners that still fly.

title: Horror & Gothic Classics
description: Dark atmospheres, psychological dread, monsters, and haunting ideas—essential gothic classics and horror foundations.

title: Mystery Classics
description: Detective fiction that defined the genre—clever cases, sharp deductions, and endlessly rereadable mysteries.

title: Science Fiction Classics
description: Time travel, other worlds, and thought experiments—early science fiction classics that shaped modern sci-fi.

title: Psychological Fiction Classics
description: Guilt, obsession, moral pressure, and inner conflict—classics where the biggest battle happens inside the mind.
